user.title: Qbit Airdrop
user.description: Connect to your qBittorrent WebUI. This integration assumes WebUI authentication is disabled.

data.confirm_delete: Confirm before deleting a torrent and its files

error.invalid_host_port: Host is required and port must be a positive number.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach qBittorrent at that host and port. Check that the WebUI is enabled and reachable.
